backstory.original: Aila was found and raised by a clan of wild elves, but never truly felt like she belonged. The tartan that was found with her is the only clue she has to her lost elven roots. Aila is stubborn and proud. Whenever anyone questions her past, she simply states 'I'm a delight!'. However, her smirk holds a lifetime of anger & questions that she's held close to her heart.
backstory.display: 艾拉被一个野精灵氏族发现并抚养长大，但她从未真正感到自己属于这个氏族。与她一起被发现的格纹布，是她对自己遗失的精灵血脉唯一的线索。艾拉很固执也很骄傲，每当有人质疑她的过去时，她总是会说“我很开心！”。然而，她的微笑中蕴含着一生的愤怒和疑问，她把这些紧紧地憋在心里。

description.original: Aila attacks the nearest enemy with her warhammer, the Howling Gale, knocking them back slightly.
description.display: 艾拉用战锤“狂风呼啸”攻击距离最近的敌人，将其稍微击退。

description.original: Aila unleashes lightning across all her enemies, damaging and stunning all of them.
description.display: 艾拉向所有敌人释放闪电，造成伤害和眩晕。

longDescription.original: Aila unleashes lightning across all enemies, damaging and stunning them for 5 seconds. Deals 10% more damage for each stack of Aerois Synergy.
longDescription.display: 艾拉向所有敌人释放闪电，对其造成伤害并眩晕 5 秒。每层埃罗伊斯协同均使造成的伤害提高 10%。

description.desc: A random enemy approaching the formation is zapped by lightning and becomes Primed every $prime_time seconds. Primed enemies take 50% more damage from all Champions.
靠近阵型一名随机敌人被闪电击中，每 $prime_time 秒获得刺激效果。受刺激的敌人额外受到所有勇士 50% 的伤害。

tipText.original: Aila periodically Primes enemies with her lightning aura, increasing the damage they take from all Champions.
tipText.display: 艾拉周期性地利用闪电灵光刺激敌人，提高所有勇士对其造成的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%。

When Aila attacks a Primed enemy they are stunned for $stun_time seconds and become Electrified, increasing the damage they take from all Champions by 100% for each Electrified normal enemy on the screen, and 1000% for each Electrified boss on the screen. Stacks additively.
艾拉攻击一名被刺激的敌人时，该敌人将被眩晕 $stun_time 秒并带电，使其从所有勇士处受到的伤害提高 100%，屏幕上每有一个带电首领，则提高 1000%。以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Aila's attacks cause Primed enemies to become Electrified, further increasing the damage they take from all Champions.
tipText.display: 艾拉的攻击会导致被刺激的敌人遭到电击，进一步提高所有勇士对其造成的伤害。

description.desc: Whenever Aila attacks an Electrified enemy, the Electrified state spreads to nearby enemies who are Primed, then all nearby enemies who are Electrified are stunned for $stun_time seconds.
每当艾拉攻击一名带电的敌人时，带电状态扩散到附近被刺激的敌人身上，然后附近所有带电的敌人都被晕眩 $stun_time 秒。
When an Electrified enemy attacks Aila she gains a damage shield equal to 0.5% of her health times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks. This effect has a 30 second cooldown.
当一名带电的敌人攻击艾拉时，她获得一个伤害护盾，数值等同于其生命值的 0.5% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同总堆叠层数。此效果有 30 秒冷却时间。
Reduce the cooldown of Storm Aura by 3 seconds.
风暴灵光冷却时间缩短 3 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Aila is one with the storm, and primes enemies more quickly.
specializationDescription.display: 艾拉化身风暴使者，刺激敌人的速度更快。

description.desc: Doubles the stun durations of Storm Soul and Raging Storm.
风暴之魂和狂怒风暴的眩晕持续时间翻倍。

specializationDescription.original: Aila's storm is more forceful, stunning enemies for a longer duration.
specializationDescription.display: 艾拉的风暴更为猛烈，眩晕敌人的持续时间更长。

description.desc: Aila contributes one stack to Aerois Synergy every time any Champion attacks an Electrified enemy. Their maximum number of stacks is 200 plus the highest area completed in the current run divided by 5 (rounded down). 10% of her contributed stacks are removed when changing areas. Electrified enemies take additional damage equal to 10% times the total number of Aerois Synergy stacks.
每当任意勇士攻击一名带电的敌人时，艾拉都为埃罗伊斯协同贡献一层堆叠。其最大堆叠层数为 200 加上当前关卡中完成的最高区域除以 5（向下舍入）。改变区域时，移除她所贡献堆叠的 10%。带电敌人受到的额外伤害等同于 10% 乘以埃罗伊斯协同的堆叠总层数。

description.original: I'll take the hits so you don't have to.
description.display: 我来承受打击，你们不用承受。

description.original: Nothing can stand between us and victory!
description.display: 没有什么能阻挡我们胜利！

description.original: Living in the storm has toughened me up.
description.display: 生活在暴风雨中让我变得更坚强。

description.original: Falling trees and flying stones couldn't take me down.
description.display: 坠落的树和乱飞的石头都无法击倒我。
你会为那个举动后悔的。

description.original: My best wisdom: Don't go outside during a storm.
description.display: 我最重要的经验之谈：暴风雨的时候不要去外面。

description.original: Line them up to take them down.
description.display: 给它们排好队，再干掉它们。

description.original: If I can survive the storm, I can survive this.
description.display: 如果我能在暴风雨中活下来，那么这次也不在话下。

description.original: The Howling Gale is all the protection we need.
description.display: 我们有狂风呼啸的保护就够了。

description.original: I'll bring the storm to you.
Even flowers must endure the storm.
description.display: 即使是花朵也要经受风雨。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Aila was found and raised by a clan of wild elves, but never truly felt like she belonged. The tartan that was found with her is the only clue she has to her lost elven roots. Aila is stubborn and proud. Whenever anyone questions her past, she simply states 'I'm a delight!'. However, her smirk holds a lifetime of anger & questions that she's held close to her heart.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Aila is a tank Champion who unleashes ancestral lightning upon her opponents to increase the damage they take from herself and her allies.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 艾拉被一个野精灵氏族发现并抚养长大，但她从未真正感到自己属于这个氏族。与她一起被发现的格纹布，是她对自己遗失的精灵血脉唯一的线索。艾拉很固执也很骄傲，每当有人质疑她的过去时，她总是会说“我很开心！”。然而，她的微笑中蕴含着一生的愤怒和疑问，她把这些紧紧地憋在心里。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 艾拉是一名坦克型勇士，会对对手释放先祖闪电，使其受到来自艾拉和她队友的伤害提高。

display.name: 风暴召唤者
